column2: LinuxCNC + Mesa 7i97T + Mesa 7i49 resolver interface + Mesa 7i84U field I/O
COMMISSIONING_PENDING and ACCEPTED_VERIFY require cabinet verification before wiring or energizing outputs. HOLD_CONFLICT requires resolution first.
Axis feedback is Tamagawa resolver feedback through the 7i49, not quadrature encoder feedback.
The hardware E-stop chain removes hazardous power. Mesa TB5.10 is a monitor input only.
TB3 analog axis order is X=0, Z=1, Y=2.
7i97T terminal map; 7i49 resolver map; 7i84U field I/O; HAL cross-reference; open items/conflicts.
The prior workbook remains unchanged as the backup/reference copy.
